basic_details.job_title: OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha University of Agriculture & Technology (OUAT) Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website www.ouat.ac.in. A total of 31 Assistant vacancies have been announced through the OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ouat.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OUAT Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the OUAT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download OUAT Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ouat.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 is 12th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant post at OUAT?
faq.answer: There are a total of 31 vacancies announced for the Assistant post in the Odisha University of Agriculture & Technology (OUAT) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the official website of OUAT?
faq.answer: The official website of Odisha University of Agriculture & Technology (OUAT) is www.ouat.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is E-II-II/02/2019 (Part)/10984 /UAT, Dt. 13th July, 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the OUAT Assistant Recruitment 2026 is for contractual positions.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 751003.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date is 13th July 2026, and the last date for the receipt of applications is 12th August 2026.
